name: Virtual World Oto-Hime - Toutou
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>脳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>堺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>嫦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>兎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>トゥ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>々</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>トゥ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are Psychic and/or Wyrm monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If this card is in your GY: You can discard 1 Psychic or Wyrm monster; Special Summon this card as a Tuner, but banish it when it leaves the field, also for the rest of this turn, you can only Special Summon Level/Rank 3 or higher monsters. You can only use this effect of "Virtual World Oto-Hime - Toutou" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are Psychic and/or Wyrm monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If this card is in your GY: You can discard 1 Psychic or Wyrm monster; Special Summon this card as a Tuner, but banish it when it leaves the field, also for the rest of this turn, you can only Special Summon Level/Rank 3 or higher monsters. You can only use this effect of "Virtual World Oto-Hime - Toutou" once per turn.
eff: If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are Psychic and/or Wyrm monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If this card is in your GY: You can discard 1 Psychic or Wyrm monster; Special Summon this card as a Tuner, but banish it when it leaves the field, also for the rest of this turn, you can only Special Summon Level/Rank 3 or higher monsters. You can only use this effect of "Virtual World Oto-Hime - Toutou" once per turn.

stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Level specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Rank specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
